# Emmanuel Francis Ramos — Senior Frontend Engineer

> Senior frontend engineer with 9+ years building production web applications in React, TypeScript, Vue, Nuxt and AI-native engineering workflows. Owns features end-to-end — from design systems to shipped, real-time interfaces — across enterprise, banking, e-commerce and product platforms. Open to remote freelance and full-time roles. Contact: hello@ponnex.dev (replies within 24h).

## About
- Name: Emmanuel Francis Ramos (alias "Ponnex")
- Role: Senior Frontend Engineer, remote
- Experience: 9+ years shipping production web apps across 9 industries
- Availability: open to select freelance and full-time remote work
- Daily stack: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Vue, Nuxt, Tailwind, SCSS
- AI-native: Claude Code, Cursor, MCP integrations, spec-driven development (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, SPEC.md)
- Also production: TanStack Query, Redux, Zustand, Vitest, Playwright, Storybook, Turborepo, GitHub Actions, Vercel

## Key projects
- [Singapore Airlines](https://ponnex.dev/projects/sia/): revamped the official site, migrated a legacy JS codebase to Vue + TypeScript without disrupting live booking traffic (2020)
- [Odin.fun](https://ponnex.dev/projects/odin/): real-time trading platform — React/Tailwind frontend with sub-second market data (2025)
- [Bioniq](https://ponnex.dev/projects/bioniq/): fast inscription marketplace with secure token bridging and near-instant settlement UX (2023)
- [Toniq](https://ponnex.dev/projects/toniq/): non-custodial digital asset marketplace (2022)
- [Singapore Biennale 2019](https://ponnex.dev/projects/biennale/): redesigned the website and content for the contemporary-art event (2019)
